message:
refactor: consolidate duplicate code across codegen (-400 lines)

DRY helpers in async_state_machine.zig:
- emitBinOp(), emitInt(), emitFloat(), isFrameField()

DRY helpers in class_methods.zig:
- emitCapturedVarParams(), emitComptimeTypeGuard()

DRY helpers in signature.zig:
- getInferredReturnTypeStr(), emitInferredReturnType()

Consolidate producesBlockExpression() from 11 files to expressions.zig

Convert isRuntimeExceptionType to StaticStringMap for O(1) lookup
